mission.title: langflow: Ollama component cannot get models from Ollama server
mission.description: Ollama component cannot get models from Ollama server. This issue affects 7+ users.

steps.title: Identify langflow troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your langflow installation:
```bash
pip show langflow | grep Version
```
Look for the Ollama component failing to list available models from the Ollama server.

steps.title: Review the issue
steps.description: The Ollama component in Langflow does not pick up the models from the Ollama server. This was caused by a regression introduced in a recent code change that broke the model listing functionality.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Ollama component model listing
steps.description:
The fix corrects the model listing logic in the Ollama component. After applying the fix, the component should return the available models:
```json
[
    "model1",
    "model2",
    "model3"
]
```
Upgrade langflow to the version that includes this bug fix:
```bash
pip install --upgrade langflow
```

steps.title: Confirm the issue is resolved
steps.description: Verify the fix by checking that the Ollama component in Langflow can now successfully list and connect to models from your Ollama server.

resolution.summary: Fixed a regression in the Ollama component's model listing logic that prevented it from discovering available models on the Ollama server.

prerequisites.description: Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). A running Ollama server with at least one model pulled.
